description.value:
Baby Den Den Mushi Item 2

Uncommon

A tiny snail worn on the wrist or kept in a breast pocket. It is psychically bonded to a specific larger Den Den Mushi (established when purchased — work with your GM to determine which one). When a call comes in, the snail stirs and its face briefly mimics the caller's expression.

Long-Range Communication: As a single action, you can use the Baby Den Den Mushi to initiate a voice call with its bonded Den Den Mushi at any range, provided neither snail is in a jamming field. The call is two-way and can be maintained as long as both parties wish. You can also receive incoming calls (the snail wriggles to alert you).

Voice Mimicry: The snail perfectly replicates the caller's voice. Listeners cannot identify the transmission as a relay through mundane means (DC 20 Perception to notice).

Dropping the snail in seawater cuts the call immediately. It is not waterproof.
description.gm: At time of purchase, record which Den Den Mushi this Baby is bonded to. If the bonded snail is destroyed, captured, or inside a White Den Den Mushi's jamming field, calls cannot connect. The bond cannot be transferred without a trained Den Den Mushi handler and a week of acclimation (cost: 50 gp).
